reason: Kitchen sink backing up, water pooling under the cabinet. Asked how soon someone could come out and roughly what it costs.
likely_objection: Worried it'll be an expensive emergency call-out and that no one can come today.

business_profile.name: Bayfront Plumbing Co.
business_profile.sla_window: within the hour during business hours

economics.note: Conservative figures the business supplies: a typical drain/leak call-out ticket, and the share of recovered missed calls that book when reached fast with a real slot. The agent claims revenue only on a shipped, passing recovery.
